title: CacheGen — KV Cache Compression Codec
summary_zh: 使用客製化 codec 將 KV cache tensor 編碼為緊湊 bitstream，利用分佈特性實現 3.5–4.3× 壓縮、TTFT 降低 3.2–3.7×。分散式節點間 agent context 傳輸的關鍵技術。
summary_en: Encodes KV cache tensors into compact bitstreams using a custom codec, exploiting distributional properties for 3.5–4.3x compression and 3.2–3.7x TTFT reduction. A key technique for transferring agent context across distributed nodes.
